subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God that have been sent down in truth unto a leaf among the leaves which was witnessed from the Tree of Love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الله قد نزلت بالحق لورقه من اوراق التی کانت عن شجره الحب مشهودا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment
